### Description
Please describe the changes in detail, including their rationale and which open issues they resolve (using the `Closes #123` keyword).

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-functional changes)
- [ ] Code Quality / Refactoring (style, testing, linting)

### Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved all TypeScript and lint issues.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally under Node v20/v22.
- [ ] My changes build successfully via `npm run build` without warning logs.
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation (`API.md`, `USER_GUIDE.md`, etc.).
- [ ] No private environment variables or secrets have been committed.

### Verification Evidence
Please paste screenshots of successful builds or terminal outputs verifying the visual changes or successful backend executions.
